welcome.body:
A keyboard. A dream. Every keystroke = Lines of Code.
Type to fill the code queue. Execute to earn $$$.

tech_tree.body:
Tech tree unlocked! Research upgrades with cash and LoC.
Run `cd tech-tree && ls` to browse nodes.

sidebar.body:
File explorer unlocked! Browse and buy upgrades by tier.
Run `ls upgrades/` to see what's available.

execution.body:
type → queue → execute → $$$
Code piles up. FLOPS burn through it. Cash flows.

first_purchase.body: First upgrade purchased! Check your stats with `status`.

first_tier.body:
New tier reached! More upgrades, more power.
Run `ls upgrades/` to see what's new.

ai_lab.body:
AI Lab online. Workers now produce tokens instead of LoC.
AI models consume tokens + FLOPS → massive LoC output.
